explanation.recommendation: Run now if the fissure tier matches relics you plan to crack or if Omnia/fast mission overlap improves EV.
explanation.expectedOutcome: 8.89 estimated EV/minute before user inventory adjustments.
dataBasis: warframestat fissure payload
Prime/Relic method EV multiplier by tier and mission speed
liquidity: Uses current relic/prime liquidity where available; confidence is lower without manual inventory.
risks: User relic inventory is manual/unknown; verify you have useful relics for this tier.
alternatives: Hold traces for Radiant chase relics
